task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open and displaying the file 'bcp_draft.docx'.

task_completion.description: Change the Business Impact Analysis section to landscape orientation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page containing the heading 'Business Impact Analysis' is visibly in landscape orientation (the page width is greater than its height).

task_completion.description: Change the Emergency Contact Matrix section to landscape orientation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page containing the heading 'Appendix A: Emergency Contact Matrix' is visibly in landscape orientation (the page width is greater than its height).

task_completion.description: Ensure narrative sections remain in portrait orientation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pages containing the headings 'Executive Summary' and 'Recovery Strategies' are visibly in portrait orientation (the page height is greater than its width).

task_completion.description: Save the reformatted document as a new file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the application title bar shows the filename 'bcp_formatted.docx', indicating the document is being saved to the correct new path.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to edit the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application like LibreOffice Writer (e.g., opening Page Style dialogs, inserting manual breaks) rather than executing terminal commands or Python scripts to modify the file.

integrity.description: The original draft document was not overwritten
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the 'Save As' function to create the new file or copies the file in the file manager/terminal before editing, rather than just clicking 'Save' on the original 'bcp_draft.docx'.

integrity.description: The original text and tables were preserved
integrity.visual_evidence: The document's text, headings, and tables appear intact and identical to the original draft, with only the page orientations and page breaks modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/bcp_draft.docx. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/bcp_formatted.docx. Required landscape sections: 'Business Impact Analysis' and 'Emergency Contact Matrix'. Required portrait sections: 'Executive Summary' and 'Recovery Strategies'. The document must have at least 4 sections.
